class.name: ARAnchor
class.brief_description: A positioned anchor in AR space.
class.description: Base wrapper for ARKit anchors. Use it for generic anchor inspection or create anchors to place custom content in the session with [method ARSession.add_anchor]. More specific anchor types such as [ARPlaneAnchor], [ARImageAnchor], and [ARMeshAnchor] expose additional data.

method.name: copy_anchor
method.description: Returns a copy of this anchor when the underlying platform supports cloning. Returns [code]null[/code] if the anchor cannot be copied.

method.name: create
method.description: Creates a new unnamed anchor at [param transform]. Use the result with [method ARSession.add_anchor].

method.name: create_named
method.description: Creates a new anchor with [param name] at [param transform]. The name is useful for identifying custom anchors when they are reported back through session signals.

members.member: A unique identifier for this anchor instance.
The optional name assigned to this anchor.
The identifier of the AR session that produced this anchor, when available.
The anchor transform in world space.
